# `abbr list` for [platform](/commands/categories/platform.md)

<div class='command-title'>List all defined abbreviations.</div>

## Signature

```> abbr list {flags} ```


## Input/output types:

| input   | output |
| ------- | ------ |
| nothing | table  |
## Examples

List all abbreviations
```nu
> abbr list

```
